title: Support Ticket Router LLM
summary: Classify tickets, suggest queues, and summarize urgency drivers for faster support workflows.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: Support Ticket Router LLM is positioned as a Operations AI starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Classify tickets, suggest queues, and summarize urgency drivers for faster support workflows.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on tickets, routing, llm.
